_meta.description: CosmoTender facts template. Update live_stats from Supabase analysis to refresh the website stats bar. animation_scenes documents the numbers baked into the Cosmic animation — update them here for reference, then rebuild scenes.jsx to apply changes to the video.

hidden_facts._note: Facts derived from the live TenderNed database. Confirmed=true means verified from 4 738 rows (Jan–May 2026). Re-run the supabase_query field to refresh. These feed into new animation scenes — update scenes.jsx to add them.

facts.detail_nl: In april 2026 werden 1.796 aanbestedingen gepubliceerd — het hoogste maandvolume in het lopende jaar. Biedteams die in maart beginnen met monitoring pakken de meeste kansen.
facts.detail_en: April 2026 saw 1,796 published tenders — the highest monthly volume this year. Bid teams that start monitoring in March capture the most opportunities.
facts.supabase_query: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM published_at) AS m, COUNT(*) FROM tenders WHERE published_at >= '2026-01-01' GROUP BY m ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

facts.detail_nl: Mei heeft de meeste aanbestedingsdeadlines in 2026 — slim instarten in maart geeft een beslissend voordeel bij de piekdruk.
facts.detail_en: May has the most tender deadlines in 2026 — starting smart in March gives a decisive edge during the peak crunch.
facts.supabase_query: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM deadline_at) AS m, COUNT(*) FROM tenders WHERE deadline_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

facts.detail_nl: De CPV-code kolom is nog niet beschikbaar in de tenders tabel. Voeg cpv_code toe aan de ingest pipeline om dit te activeren.
facts.detail_en: The CPV code column is not yet present in the tenders table. Add cpv_code to the ingest pipeline to enable this insight.
facts.supabase_query: -- Requires cpv_code column. Add to ingest first.

facts.detail_nl: Gemiddeld 104 dagen tussen publicatie en deadline (op basis van 1.668 aanbestedingen met bekende deadline). Wie pas na publicatie begint, verliest al een week.
facts.detail_en: Average 104 days between publication and deadline (based on 1,668 tenders with a known deadline). Waiting until after publication wastes a full week of runway.
facts.supabase_query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (deadline_at - published_at)) / 86400)) AS avg_days FROM tenders WHERE deadline_at IS NOT NULL AND published_at IS NOT NULL AND deadline_at > published_at

facts.label_en: Sector with highest avg contract value
facts.detail_nl: Zorgsector aanbestedingen hebben een gemiddelde geschatte waarde van € 16,5 M — bijna 4× die van schoonmaak (€ 4,5 M). De hoogste ticket, maar ook de langste procestijden.
facts.detail_en: Healthcare tenders average an estimated value of € 16.5 M — nearly 4× that of cleaning contracts (€ 4.5 M). Highest ticket size, but also the longest process timelines.
facts.supabase_query: SELECT sector, ROUND(AVG(estimated_value_eur)) AS avg_eur, COUNT(*) AS n FROM tenders WHERE estimated_value_eur IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sector ORDER BY avg_eur DESC

animation_scenes._note: These numbers are hardcoded in scenes.jsx inside the Cosmic animation bundle. Editing this file updates the reference only — to change what the animation shows, edit scenes.jsx and rebuild the standalone HTML.
